warnings: Detected over-concatenated SCPI command strings; split into grouped steps (max 3 per step).

response.text:
I built a new AFG31000 pyvisa flow that sets CH1 to a 1 kHz, 2 Vpp sine into 50 ohms and turns the output on.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Create a new AFG31000 pyvisa flow to output a 1 kHz 2 Vpp sine wave on CH1 into 50 ohms and enable the output.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":["Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Long semicolon command chains were split and grouped for readability (max 3 commands per step).","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"afg1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"AFG31000 Sine 1kHz 2Vpp 50ohm Output On","description":"Configure CH1 for a 1 kHz sine wave at 2 Vpp into 50 ohms and turn the output on.","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"AFG","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["afg1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"id":"g_concat_vuj1d7","type":"group","label":"Set Waveform and Levels","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"type":"write","label":"Set Waveform and Levels","params":{"command":"SOURce1:FUNCtion:SHAPe SINusoid"},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"write","label":"Set Waveform and Levels","params":{"command":"SOURce1:FREQuency:FIXed 1000"},"id":"cmd_4tapuq"},{"type":"write","label":"Set Waveform and Levels","params":{"command":"SOURce1:VOLTage:LEVel:IMMediate:AMPLitude 2"},"id":"cmd_iza28e"},{"type":"write","label":"Set Waveform and Levels","params":{"command":"OUTPut1:IMPedance 50"},"id":"cmd_4lmk05"}]},{"type":"write","label":"Enable Output","params":{"command":"OUTPut1:STATe ON"},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["afg1"]},"id":"s1_4"}]}}]}

flow.name: AFG31000 Sine 1kHz 2Vpp 50ohm Output On
